title: Services Australians often compare when moving to the Netherlands
intro: Banking, housing, insurance, shipping, and mobile are common categories to line up across a long-haul move.

items.reason: International transfers between AUD and EUR during the transition.
Digital Dutch banking often used after BSN and address.
Short and mid-term listings while you search for a long-term rental.
Compare Dutch basic health insurance once you are resident.
